installDialog.title: Install External Adapter
installDialog.description: Add an adapter from npm or a local path. The adapter package must export
installDialog.pathHint: Accepts Linux, WSL, and Windows paths. Windows paths are auto-converted.

alphaNotice.title: External adapters are alpha.
alphaNotice.description: The adapter plugin system is under active development. APIs and storage format may change. Use the power icon to hide adapters from agent menus without removing them.

noExternalAdapters.title: No external adapters installed
noExternalAdapters.description: Install an adapter package to extend model support.

reinstallDialog.title: Reinstall Adapter
reinstallDialog.description: This will pull the latest version of
reinstallDialog.descriptionSuffix: from npm and hot-swap the running adapter module. Existing agents will use the new version on their next run.

removeDialog.title: Remove Adapter
removeDialog.description: Are you sure you want to remove the
removeDialog.descriptionSuffix: adapter? It will be unregistered and removed from the adapter store.
removeDialog.npmCleanup: npm packages will be cleaned up from disk.

executionWorkspaceDetail.description: Configure the concrete runtime workspace that Paperclip reuses for this issue flow.
executionWorkspaceDetail.descriptionExtended: These settings stay attached to the execution workspace so future runs can keep local paths, repo refs, provisioning, teardown, and runtime-service behavior in sync with the actual workspace being reused.
executionWorkspaceDetail.serviceEmptyWithConfig: No services have been started for this execution workspace yet.
executionWorkspaceDetail.serviceEmptyNoConfig: No workspace command config is defined for this execution workspace yet.
executionWorkspaceDetail.jobEmpty: No one-shot jobs are configured for this execution workspace yet.
executionWorkspaceDetail.disabledHint: Execution workspaces need a working directory before local commands can run, and services also need runtime config.
executionWorkspaceDetail.workspaceSettingsDescription: Edit the concrete path, repo, branch, provisioning, teardown, and runtime overrides attached to this execution workspace.
executionWorkspaceDetail.provisionCommandHint: Runs when Paperclip prepares this execution workspace
executionWorkspaceDetail.teardownCommandHint: Runs when the execution workspace is archived or cleaned up
executionWorkspaceDetail.runtimeConfigOverride: This execution workspace currently overrides the project workspace runtime config.
executionWorkspaceDetail.runtimeConfigInherited: This execution workspace is inheriting the project workspace runtime config.
executionWorkspaceDetail.runtimeConfigNone: No runtime config is currently defined on this execution workspace or its project workspace.
executionWorkspaceDetail.advancedRuntimeDescription: Override the inherited workspace command model only when this execution workspace truly needs different service or job behavior.
executionWorkspaceDetail.workspaceCommandsJsonHint: Legacy `services` arrays still work, but `commands` supports both services and jobs.
executionWorkspaceDetail.noOperations: No workspace operations have been recorded yet.
executionWorkspaceDetail.workspaceRoutinesDescription: Routines that use workspace-specific variables can be run against this execution workspace.
executionWorkspaceDetail.noRoutines: No routines use workspace-specific variables yet.
executionWorkspaceDetail.routineStartedBody: Paperclip created a run using this execution workspace.
executionWorkspaceDetail.routineRunFailedBody: Paperclip could not start the routine run.

validation.repoUrlInvalid: Repo URL must be a valid URL.
validation.jsonMustBeObject: Workspace commands JSON must be a JSON object.

closeDialog.archiveAndCleanup: Archive {{name}} and clean up any owned workspace artifacts. Paperclip keeps the workspace record and issue history, but removes it from active workspace views.
closeDialog.checkingSafety: Checking whether this workspace is safe to close...
closeDialog.failedToInspect: Failed to inspect workspace close readiness.
closeDialog.sharedWorkspace: This is a shared workspace session. Archiving it removes this session record but keeps the underlying project workspace.
closeDialog.ownCheckoutPath: This execution workspace has its own checkout path and can be archived independently.
closeDialog.primaryWorkspacePath: This execution workspace currently points at the project's primary workspace path.
closeDialog.disposableWorkspace: This workspace is disposable and can be archived.
closeDialog.cleanupFailedHint: Cleanup previously failed on this workspace. Retrying close will rerun the cleanup flow and update the workspace status if it succeeds.

projectWorkspaceDetail.description: Configure the concrete workspace Paperclip attaches to this project. These values drive per-workspace checkout behavior, default runtime services for child execution workspaces, and let you override setup or cleanup commands when one workspace needs special handling.
projectWorkspaceDetail.primaryCodebase: This is the project's primary codebase workspace.
projectWorkspaceDetail.setupCommandHint: Runs when this workspace needs custom bootstrap
projectWorkspaceDetail.cleanupCommandHint: Runs before project-level execution workspace teardown
projectWorkspaceDetail.advancedRuntimeDescription: Paperclip derives Services and Jobs from this JSON. Prefer editing named commands first; use raw JSON for advanced lifecycle, port, readiness, or environment settings.
projectWorkspaceDetail.workspaceCommandsJsonHint: Execution workspaces inherit this config unless they override it. Legacy `services` arrays still work, but `commands` supports both services and jobs.
projectWorkspaceDetail.servicesAndJobsDescription: Long-running services stay supervised here, while one-shot jobs run on demand against this workspace. Execution workspaces inherit this config unless they override it.
projectWorkspaceDetail.serviceEmptyWithConfig: No services have been started for this workspace yet.
projectWorkspaceDetail.serviceEmptyNoConfig: No workspace command config is defined for this workspace yet.
projectWorkspaceDetail.jobEmpty: No one-shot jobs are configured for this workspace yet.
projectWorkspaceDetail.disabledHint: Project workspaces need a working directory before local commands can run, and services also need runtime config.
projectWorkspaceDetail.workspaceNotFound: Workspace not found for this project.

sourceTypeOptions.localGitCheckoutDescription: A local path Paperclip can use directly.
sourceTypeOptions.localNonGitPathDescription: A local folder without git semantics.
sourceTypeOptions.remoteGitRepoDescription: A repo URL with optional refs and local checkout.
sourceTypeOptions.remoteManagedDescription: A hosted workspace tracked by external reference.

validation.remoteManagedRequiresRef: Remote-managed workspaces require a remote workspace ref or repo URL.
validation.requiresPathOrUrl: Workspace requires at least one local path or repo URL.
validation.pathMustBeAbsolute: Local workspace path must be absolute.
validation.repoUrlInvalid: Repo URL must be a valid URL.
validation.jsonMustBeObject: Workspace commands JSON must be a JSON object.

projectWorkspaceDetail.serviceStopped: Workspace service stopped. Issue execution is not paused.
projectWorkspaceDetail.serviceRestarted: Workspace service restarted. Issue execution is not paused.
